sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20473" key="bou" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-</orth>, prefix used in compos. (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βουγάϊος</foreign>, etc.), <sense id="n20473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">huge, monstrous.</tr_> (From <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βοῦς</foreign>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππο-</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
